description_long: This lantern features a geometric, cube-shaped body with a striking stained glass design. Each face of the lantern is adorned with a symmetrical pattern of concentric diamonds and circles, rendered in shades of blue and bordered by dark, metallic framework. The glass panels appear semi-translucent, allowing light to diffuse softly through the colored surfaces. The structure is robust, with clean, sharp edges and a modern, almost art deco aesthetic. The lantern is likely designed to be post-mounted or placed on a flat surface, making it suitable for urban parks or sidewalks. Its decorative motifs and sturdy build suggest both functional illumination and visual appeal in public spaces.
description: A cube-shaped lantern with blue stained glass panels and bold geometric patterns framed in dark metal, designed for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full diamond and circle pattern centered on the blue glass panel, framed by dark metal.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with the same geometric stained glass design and metal framework.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same blue glass and concentric diamond motif.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the repeated geometric pattern and stained glass panel.
